business.name: Mustang Service Center
business.tagline: Expert Mustang Repair & Performance in Dallas, TX

seo.title: Mustang Service Center | Expert Mustang Repair & Performance in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Dallas's trusted Mustang specialists since 2005. 4.9-star rated. From classic restoration to modern performance tuning, we keep your pony running strong. Call (214) 824-6716.

hero.headline: Keep Your Mustang Running Strong
hero.subheadline: From classic restorations to modern performance upgrades, our expert mechanics deliver precision service that honors the legacy of your pony car.

featureSections.title: Unlock Your Mustang's True Potential
featureSections.body: Whether you're chasing horsepower on the track or a smooth daily driver, our certified technicians use state-of-the-art dyno tuning and diagnostic equipment to optimize your engine, transmission, and suspension.
bullets: Cold air intakes, exhaust, and supercharger installs
featureSections.cardBody: Our most popular package includes a full dyno tune, cold air intake, and cat-back exhaust – guaranteed to add 30+ horsepower.

featureSections.title: Bring Your Classic Back to Life
featureSections.body: From a frame-off restoration to a simple engine rebuild, we have the expertise to restore your classic Mustang to its former glory – or better. We source OEM and high-quality aftermarket parts to maintain authenticity and reliability.
bullets: Paint and bodywork matching original specs
featureSections.cardBody: Our team includes master technicians who have worked on every generation of Mustang, from 1964½ to the latest models.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Mustang Experts
whyChooseUs.description: Our technicians are ASE-certified and specialize exclusively in Ford Mustangs. We know every nut, bolt, and module of your car.

whyChooseUs.title: State-of-the-Art Equipment
whyChooseUs.description: We invest in the latest diagnostic and repair tools, including a chassis dyno, scan tools, and factory-level programming equipment.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: You'll get a detailed estimate before any work begins. No hidden fees, no surprises – just honest, fair pricing.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty on all repairs. Your Mustang is our priority.

testimonials.quote: They transformed my '66 coupe into a showstopper. The attention to detail was incredible – even the original radio works perfectly.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: Brought my '15 GT in for a supercharger install. The team kept me updated daily, and the car runs like a beast. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Jessica L.

testimonials.quote: Honest, skilled, and fair. They fixed a transmission issue that two other shops couldn't diagnose. I'll never go anywhere else.
testimonials.author: David K.

cta.headline: Ready to Give Your Mustang the Care It Deserves?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the difference of true specialists.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to high-performance builds, our team delivers expert service for every generation of Ford Mustang. Explore our comprehensive range of services below.

services.title: Performance Upgrades & Tuning
services.shortDescription: Boost horsepower, torque, and throttle response with custom tuning and bolt-on upgrades.
services.longDescription: Unlock your Mustang's full potential with our performance tuning services. Using advanced dyno tuning, we calibrate your engine's ECU for optimal air/fuel ratios and ignition timing. We also install cold air intakes, exhaust systems, superchargers, and turbochargers to maximize power output. Whether you're building a track monster or a spirited street car, we ensure every modification works in harmony.
benefits: Custom calibration tailored to your driving style

process.title: Consultation & Dyno Baseline
process.description: We discuss your goals, inspect your vehicle, and run a baseline dyno pull to measure current performance.

process.title: Installation & Tuning
process.description: Our technicians install your chosen upgrades and perform live dyno tuning to optimize power and safety.

process.title: Final Validation & Road Test
process.description: We verify all systems, perform a final dyno pull, and road test to ensure everything performs flawlessly.

faqs.question: Will tuning void my warranty?
faqs.answer: Aftermarket tuning can void your factory warranty. However, we offer tuning solutions that can be reverted to stock if needed. We always advise checking with your dealer.

faqs.question: How much horsepower can I expect?
faqs.answer: Gains vary by modification. A simple tune and intake can add 15-25 HP, while a supercharger kit can add 150+ HP. We'll provide realistic estimates during consultation.

services.title: Engine & Transmission Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert diagnostics and repair for all Mustang engines and transmissions.
services.longDescription: From minor repairs to complete rebuilds, our technicians have the expertise to handle any engine or transmission issue. We service all generations, including the classic 289/302, modern Coyote, and the latest EcoBoost. Using OEM and high-quality aftermarket parts, we ensure your powertrain runs reliably for years to come.

process.title: Comprehensive Diagnostics
process.description: We perform a thorough inspection and computer diagnostics to pinpoint the exact issue.

process.title: Detailed Estimate & Approval
process.description: You receive a written estimate with parts and labor costs. We only proceed with your approval.

process.title: Repair & Quality Check
process.description: Our experts perform the repair, followed by a multi-point inspection and road test to confirm quality.

faqs.question: How long does an engine rebuild take?
faqs.answer: A typical rebuild takes 2-4 weeks depending on parts availability and scope. We'll give you a timeline upfront.

faqs.question: Do you work on automatic and manual transmissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service both automatic and manual transmissions, including the 6R80, 10R80, MT-82, and T-5.

services.title: Classic Mustang Restoration
services.shortDescription: Full or partial restoration to bring your classic back to its prime.
services.longDescription: We specialize in restoring classic Mustangs (1964½-1973) to showroom condition. Our team handles everything from mechanical rebuilds to bodywork, paint, and interior. We source authentic parts and use period-correct techniques to preserve originality, while also offering subtle upgrades for reliability and safety.

process.title: Assessment & Planning
process.description: We evaluate the car's condition, discuss your vision, and create a detailed restoration plan with timeline and budget.

process.title: Disassembly & Restoration
process.description: We carefully disassemble, restore, or replace each component, documenting progress with photos.

process.title: Assembly & Final Detailing
process.description: We reassemble the car, perform final adjustments, and detail every surface before delivery.

faqs.question: How much does a full restoration cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary widely based on the car's condition and desired level of restoration. We provide free consultations and detailed quotes.

faqs.question: Can I choose modern upgrades during restoration?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Many owners opt for disc brake conversions, modern air conditioning, or upgraded wiring while keeping the classic look.

services.title: Routine Maintenance & Diagnostics
services.shortDescription: Keep your Mustang running smoothly with expert maintenance and advanced diagnostics.
services.longDescription: Regular maintenance is key to your Mustang's longevity and performance. We offer oil changes, brake services, fluid flushes, belt replacements, and comprehensive multi-point inspections. Our advanced diagnostic tools can quickly identify issues with electronics, drivetrain, and emissions systems.
benefits: Extends the life of your Mustang
Expert advice on future maintenance needs

process.title: Vehicle Check-In
process.description: We listen to your concerns and perform an initial walk-around inspection.

process.title: Service & Inspection
process.description: We complete the requested service and perform a 30-point inspection, checking fluids, belts, hoses, brakes, and tires.

process.title: Review & Recommendations
process.description: We review the inspection results with you, prioritize any needed repairs, and provide a detailed report.

faqs.question: How often should I change the oil in my Mustang?
faqs.answer: We recommend every 5,000-7,500 miles for synthetic oil, or per your owner's manual. For high-performance engines, more frequent changes may be beneficial.

faqs.question: Do you offer multi-point inspections?
faqs.answer: Yes, we include a free 30-point inspection with every service. It covers all major systems and helps catch issues early.

about.headline: Dallas's Mustang Specialists Since 2005
about.mission: To provide every Mustang owner with expert, honest, and passionate service that keeps their car performing at its best.
story: Mustang Service Center was founded in 2005 by master technician John Miller, a lifelong Mustang enthusiast. What started as a small two-bay shop in East Dallas quickly grew into a trusted destination for Mustang owners across the metroplex. John's philosophy was simple: treat every car as if it were your own, and never cut corners. That commitment to quality earned the shop a loyal following and a reputation for solving problems that other shops couldn't.

Today, our team includes five ASE-certified technicians with over 50 years of combined experience working exclusively on Ford Mustangs. We've invested in the latest diagnostic and repair equipment, including a Mustang-specific dyno and factory-level programming tools. While we've grown, our core values remain unchanged: transparency, craftsmanship, and a genuine love for the pony car.

coreValues.title: Expertise
coreValues.description: We specialize exclusively in Mustangs, from classic to modern. Continuous training keeps us ahead of the curve.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We provide honest assessments, transparent pricing, and never recommend unnecessary repairs.

coreValues.title: Passion
coreValues.description: We love Mustangs. That passion drives us to deliver the highest quality workmanship on every vehicle.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local car clubs, events, and charities. We're proud to be part of the Dallas Mustang community.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with the Mustang Experts
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have questions? Fill out the form or give us a call.
